personality.notes: Gets along with every horse in the stable. Dislikes being separated from the herd. Has strong opinions about which pasture she prefers.

genetics.notes: Placeholder genetics — full gene system coming soon.

abilities.name: In Full Bloom
abilities.description: Higher breeding success rate when hunger is above 80%.

abilities.name: Herd Bond
abilities.description: Recovers additional mood when sleeping next to 2+ herd members.
